questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The Industrial Revolution was a time of rapid industrialization and technological innovation in Britain.
questions.reason: Reason (R): It was characterized by the introduction of new machinery and factories.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The introduction of new machinery and factories was a key aspect of the Industrial Revolution, driving rapid industrialization and technological innovation in Britain.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The development of the steam engine was a significant innovation of the Industrial Revolution.

(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
